name: Potato Chip Caviar
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Mascarpone cheese or crème fraîche
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the Idaho potato into 1/8-inch slices.
2. Fry the slices until golden brown.
3. Place the chips on paper towels to drain excess oil.
4. Sprinkle salt and pepper over the chips.
5. Fill a piping bag with a star tip attachment.
6. Pipe about one teaspoon of Mascarpone cheese or crème fraîche onto the center of each chip.
7. Garnish with chopped chives.
8. Place 1 teaspoon of salmon caviar on either side of the mascarpone.
(Makes 1 serving)
